_meta.author: isaiahbjork
_meta.title: News Cards
_meta.description:
This is a full-featured, interactive News Feed Component with expandable cards, animated transitions, bookmark toggling, and live content rendering. It supports a three-tier visual priority system via status bars, uses LayoutGroup and AnimatePresence for shared layout animations, and conditionally disables motion for accessibility. Each card opens into a full-screen modal with detailed content, image overlays, and contextual metadata.

Perfect for AI news agents, editorial dashboards, political data platforms, or any high-fidelity news experience requiring real-time interactivity and immersive storytelling.
